creator: arareko@yahoo.com
text:
Please cancel this one, a previous PR exists and it should be used for tracking the update:

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/111817

Regards,
Mauricio.
 
--
MAURICIO HERRERA CUADRA
mauricio@arareko.net
http://www.arareko.net/

----- Original Message ----
From: Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org>
To: mauricio@arareko.net
Sent: Wednesday, April 18, 2007 12:21:07 PM
Subject: Re: ports/111821: [PATCH] biology/py-biopython: update to 1.43

Maintainer of biology/py-biopython,

Please note that PR ports/111821 has just been submitted.

If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
and a committer will take care of it.

The full text of the PR can be found at:
    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/111821

-- 
Edwin Groothuis
edwin@FreeBSD.org
